MGM Cotai Land Contract.entity_description: The MGM Cotai Land Contract is a legal agreement similar to the MGM Macau Land Contract, governing the operations of MGM Grand Paradise in the Cotai area of Macau.

April 6, 2031.entity_description: April 6, 2031 is the expiration date for certain land concessions related to MGM Grand Paradise's operations.

January 8, 2038.entity_description: January 8, 2038 is another expiration date for land concessions associated with MGM Grand Paradise.

Macau Land Law.entity_description: A set of legal provisions that govern land use and property rights in Macau, including regulations on rent amounts and property management.

Corporate Income Tax.entity_description: A tax imposed on the income or profit of corporations, which in this context refers to the tax that MGM Grand Paradise was exempted from.

October 2011.entity_description: October 2011 refers to a specific month and year when MGM Grand Paradise was granted an extension of an exemption, marking a significant point in its operational timeline.

September 7, 2016.entity_description: September 7, 2016 is the date when the exemption for MGM Grand Paradise was further extended, indicating ongoing regulatory considerations.

March 24, 2020.entity_description: March 24, 2020 is the date when another extension of the exemption was granted, showing the continuity of regulatory adjustments.

September 1, 2022.entity_description: September 1, 2022 is the date when the exemption was further extended, reflecting ongoing regulatory engagement.

granted exemption.relationship_description: The exemption for MGM Grand Paradise was further extended on September 7, 2016, showing a continued relationship between the organization and regulatory authorities regarding its operational compliance.

extended exemption.relationship_description: MGM Grand Paradise was granted an extension of an exemption in October 2011, indicating a regulatory approval process that began at that time.
